title: Add unit tests for Sprint 42/43 checkpoint changes
description:
## Problem
The checkpoint and terrain collision changes from Sprint 42 and 43 have zero test coverage. This includes:
- `AdvanceBuildCheckpoint` (happy path, missing context, duplicate event)
- `BlockPlacedEvent` handler (normal placement, terrain skip)
- `BlockPlaceSkippedEvent` handler (checkpoint NOT advanced, correlation completed)
- `_placeBlockContexts` lifecycle (entry creation, cleanup)
- `IsIdleOrWanderGoal` helper
- `IntentManager.ResolveItem` (wool→white_wool, planks→oak_planks, unknown→passthrough)

## Suggested Approach
Add tests to MemorySmith.Agent.Tests/Sprint43Tests.cs following the existing Sprint35Tests.cs pattern.

## Acceptance Criteria
- 6+ test cases covering all the above scenarios
- All pass with 0 regressions in existing 608 tests

## Priority: P0
## Labels: testing, sprint-44
